scripts.build: pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor build && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cradle build && pnpm --filter @openprose/prose-cli build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor test && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cradle test && pnpm --filter @openprose/prose-cli test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor run lint --if-present && pnpm --filter @openprose/reactor-cradle run lint --if-present && pnpm --filter @openprose/prose-cli run lint --if-present
